mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(x.qty_basic, 0)) AS TOTAL_BASIC, SUM(COALESCE(x.qty_incoming, 0)) AS TOTAL_INCOMING, SUM(COALESCE(x.qty_stock, 0)) AS TOTAL_STOCK, SUM(COALESCE(x.qty_outbound, 0)) AS TOTAL_OUTBOUND FROM ( SELECT t.itemcode, t.qty_basic, t.qty_incoming, t.qty_stock, t.qty_outbound, ci.custcode, cu.cu_sangho FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode, s.itemcode, w.itemcode, o.itemcode) AS itemcode, b.qty_basic, i.qty_incoming, s.qty_stock, (COALESCE(w.qty_wipinput, 0) + COALESCE(o.qty_load, 0)) AS qty_outbound FROM ( /* 전월재고 */ SELECT a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_basic FROM t_wms_locationbackup a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.backup_date LIKE #{startDate} || '%'
GROUP BY a.itemcode ) b FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 입고 */ SELECT a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_incoming FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode ) i ON b.itemcode = i.itemcode FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 현재고 */ SELECT a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_stock FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage, ' ', '')) IN ( UPPER(REPLACE('MATERIAL', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('PRODUCT', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Material', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Side seat', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Outside', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Fabric', ' ', '')))
GROUP BY a.itemcode ) s ON COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode) = s.itemcode FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 출고1 - 불출 (WIPINPUT) */ SELECT a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_wipinput FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.source = 'WIPINPUT' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode ) w ON COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode, s.itemcode) = w.itemcode FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 출고2 - 출고 (LOAD) */ SELECT a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_load FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.source <> 'LOADRETURN' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage, ' ', '')) IN ( UPPER(REPLACE('MATERIAL', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('PRODUCT', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Material', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Side seat', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Outside', ' ', '')), UPPER(REPLACE('Fabric', ' ', ''))) GROUP BY a.itemcode ) o ON COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode, s.itemcode, w.itemcode) = o.itemcode ) t /* 품번 기준 대표 입고처 코드 (itemcode → custcode 매핑) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.itemcode, MAX(a.custcode) AS custcode FROM t_wms_inbound a WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source <> 'INCOMINGRETURN'
GROUP BY a.itemcode ) ci ON ci.itemcode = t.itemcode /* 거래처 상호 (custcode → sangho 매핑) */ LEFT JOIN c_cust cu ON cu.cu_code = ci.custcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(REPLACE(cu.cu_sangho, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{sangho}, ' ', '')) || '%'
) x

SELECT t.storage_key AS STORAGE, t.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, m.itemname AS ITEMNAME, NVL(t.qty_basic, 0) AS QTY_BASIC, NVL(t.qty_incoming, 0) AS QTY_INCOMING, NVL(t.qty_stock, 0) AS QTY_STOCK, NVL(t.qty_outbound, 0) AS QTY_OUTBOUND, #{month} AS MONTH, NVL(ci.custcode, '') AS CUSTCODE, NVL(cu.cu_sangho, '') AS SANGHO FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(b.storage_key, i.storage_key, s.storage_key, w.storage_key, o.storage_key) AS storage_key, COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode, s.itemcode, w.itemcode, o.itemcode) AS itemcode, NVL(b.qty_basic, 0) AS qty_basic, NVL(i.qty_incoming, 0) AS qty_incoming, NVL(s.qty_stock, 0) AS qty_stock, NVL(w.qty_wipinput, 0) + NVL(o.qty_load, 0) AS qty_outbound FROM ( /* 전월재고 */ SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')) AS storage_key, a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_basic FROM t_wms_locationbackup a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.backup_date LIKE #{startDate} || '%'
GROUP BY UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')), a.itemcode ) b FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 입고 */ SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')) AS storage_key, a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_incoming FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')), a.itemcode ) i ON b.itemcode = i.itemcode AND b.storage_key = i.storage_key FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 현재고 */ SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')) AS storage_key, a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_stock FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')), a.itemcode ) s ON COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode) = s.itemcode AND COALESCE(b.storage_key, i.storage_key) = s.storage_key FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 출고1 - 불출 (WIPINPUT) */ SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')) AS storage_key, a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_wipinput FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.source = 'WIPINPUT' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')), a.itemcode ) w ON COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode, s.itemcode) = w.itemcode AND COALESCE(b.storage_key, i.storage_key, s.storage_key) = w.storage_key FULL OUTER JOIN ( /* 출고2 - 출고 (LOAD) */ SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')) AS storage_key, a.itemcode, SUM(a.qty) AS qty_load FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.source <> 'LOADRETURN' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')), a.itemcode ) o ON COALESCE(b.itemcode, i.itemcode, s.itemcode, w.itemcode) = o.itemcode AND COALESCE(b.storage_key, i.storage_key, s.storage_key, w.storage_key) = o.storage_key ) t LEFT JOIN t_mi_item m ON m.itemcode = t.itemcode LEFT JOIN ( /* 품번+창고 기준 대표 custcode */ SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')) AS storage_key, a.itemcode, MAX(a.custcode) AS custcode FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY UPPER(REPLACE(a.storage,' ','')), a.itemcode ) ci ON ci.itemcode = t.itemcode AND ci.storage_key = t.storage_key LEFT JOIN c_cust cu ON cu.cu_code = ci.custcode WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY t.storage_key, t.itemcode
SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(REPLACE(factory, ' ', '')) FROM t_wms_inbound WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND factory IS NOT NULL ORDER BY UPPER(REPLACE(factory, ' ', ''))

(SELECT UPPER(REPLACE(storage, ' ', '')) FROM t_wms_location WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND storage IS NOT NULL and storage <>'REDCAGE' AND STORAGE <> 'AUNDE' AND STORAGE <> 'P1 W/HOUSE' UNION SELECT 'MATERIAL+SIDESEAT+OUTSIDE' FROM dual) ORDER BY 1
SELECT NVL(MAX(CU_CODE), 'MMMM') FROM C_CUST WHERE UPPER(REPLACE(CU_SANGHO, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{custname}, ' ', ''))

WITH PREV AS ( SELECT a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.plusqty - a.minusqty) AS prev_stock FROM v_stock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(a.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(a.storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE')
AND a.sdate = (#{month} || '-01') AND a.kind = 'INVENTORY'
AND UPPER(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partNumber}) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.itemname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partName}) || '%'
GROUP BY a.itemcode, b.itemname ), WEEK_TXN AS ( SELECT x.itemcode, b.itemname, x.week_no, SUM(CASE WHEN x.kind IN ('INCOMING','INCOMING EXCEPTION') THEN x.plusqty - x.minusqty ELSE 0 END) AS in_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN x.kind IN ('WIP INPUT','LOAD','LOAD EXCEPTION') THEN x.plusqty - x.minusqty ELSE 0 END) AS out_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN x.kind IN ( 'INCOMING RETURN','WIP RETURN','LOAD RETURN', 'RECEIVING','SENDING','STOCKMOVE', 'PRODUCTION','PRODUCTIONMOVE','ADJUSTMENT' ) THEN x.plusqty - x.minusqty ELSE 0 END) AS etc_qty FROM ( SELECT a.itemcode, a.kind, a.plusqty, a.minusqty, CEIL( ( TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'DD')) + TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(TRUNC(TO_DATE(SDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MM'),'D')) - 1 ) / 7) AS WEEK_NO --CEIL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(a.sdate, 9, 2)) / 7) AS week_no FROM v_stock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(a.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(a.storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND a.sdate LIKE (#{month} || '%') AND a.kind <> 'INVENTORY'
AND UPPER(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partNumber}) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.itemname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partName}) || '%'
) x LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = x.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(b.itemname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partName}) || '%'
GROUP BY x.itemcode, x.week_no, b.itemname ) SELECT COALESCE(p.itemcode, w.itemcode) AS itemcode, COALESCE(p.itemname, w.itemname) AS itemname,
/* ✅ 전월재고(소수점 제거) */ TRUNC(NVL(p.prev_stock, 0)) AS prev_stock,
/* ✅ 1주차 */ TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 1 THEN w.in_qty END), 0)) AS w1_in, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 1 THEN w.out_qty END), 0)) AS w1_out, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 1 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0)) AS w1_etc, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 1 THEN w.in_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 1 THEN w.out_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 1 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0) ) AS w1_stock,
/* ✅ 2주차 */ TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 2 THEN w.in_qty END), 0)) AS w2_in, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 2 THEN w.out_qty END), 0)) AS w2_out, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 2 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0)) AS w2_etc, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 2 THEN w.in_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 2 THEN w.out_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 2 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0) ) AS w2_stock,
/* ✅ 3주차 */ TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 3 THEN w.in_qty END), 0)) AS w3_in, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 3 THEN w.out_qty END), 0)) AS w3_out, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 3 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0)) AS w3_etc, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 3 THEN w.in_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 3 THEN w.out_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 3 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0) ) AS w3_stock,
/* ✅ 4주차 */ TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 4 THEN w.in_qty END), 0)) AS w4_in, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 4 THEN w.out_qty END), 0)) AS w4_out, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 4 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0)) AS w4_etc, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 4 THEN w.in_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 4 THEN w.out_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 4 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0) ) AS w4_stock,
/* ✅ 5주차 */ TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 5 THEN w.in_qty END), 0)) AS w5_in, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 5 THEN w.out_qty END), 0)) AS w5_out, TRUNC(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no = 5 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0)) AS w5_etc, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 5 THEN w.in_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 5 THEN w.out_qty END), 0) + NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN w.week_no <= 5 THEN w.etc_qty END), 0) ) AS w5_stock FROM prev p FULL OUTER JOIN week_txn w ON p.itemcode = w.itemcode GROUP BY COALESCE(p.itemcode, w.itemcode), COALESCE(p.itemname, w.itemname), p.prev_stock ORDER BY COALESCE(p.itemcode, w.itemcode)
SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(REPLACE(factory, ' ', '')) FROM v_stock WHERE factory IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
( SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(REPLACE(storage, ' ', '')) FROM v_stock WHERE storage IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'MATERIAL+SIDESEAT+OUTSIDE' FROM dual ) ORDER BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT C.SUBNAME_CH FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM I ON I.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = I.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.OUTDATE >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.OUTDATE < TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND A.SOURCE = 'LOAD' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND C.SUBNAME_CH IS NOT NULL ORDER BY C.SUBNAME_CH

SELECT DISTINCT A.CUSTNAME FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A WHERE A.OUTDATE >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.OUTDATE < TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND A.SOURCE = 'LOAD' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.CUSTNAME IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CUSTNAME

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY a.custcode, a.itemcode ) AS ROW_NUM, NVL(b.cu_sangho, '') AS VENDOR_NAME, a.itemcode AS PNO, NVL(c.itemname, '') AS PNAME, NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) AS PREV_STOCK, NVL(a.in_qty, 0) - NVL(r.return_qty, 0) AS IN_QTY, NVL(d.out_qty, 0) AS OUT_QTY, NVL(l.current_stock, 0) AS CURRENT_STOCK, NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) - NVL(l.current_stock, 0) AS NEED_QTY, '' AS REMARK FROM ( SELECT custcode, itemcode, SUM(qty) AS in_qty FROM t_wms_inbound WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND source IN ('INCOMINGEXCEPTION', 'INCOMINGLOCAL', 'INCOMINGCKD') AND indate >= #{sdate} AND indate < #{edate} GROUP BY custcode, itemcode ) a LEFT JOIN c_cust b ON b.cu_code = a.custcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_item c ON c.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT itemcode, SUM(qty) AS return_qty FROM t_wms_workmove WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND source = 'WIPRETURN' AND indate >= #{sdate} AND indate < #{edate} GROUP BY itemcode ) r ON r.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT itemcode, SUM(qty) AS out_qty FROM ( SELECT itemcode, qty FROM t_wms_workmove WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND source = 'WIPINPUT' AND indate >= #{sdate} AND indate < #{edate}
UNION ALL
SELECT itemcode, qty FROM t_wms_outbound WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND outdate LIKE #{ym} || '%' ) GROUP BY itemcode ) d ON d.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT itemcode, SUM(qty) AS prev_stock FROM t_wms_locationbackup WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND backup_date LIKE #{prevMonthEnd} || '%' GROUP BY itemcode ) p ON p.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT itemcode, SUM(qty) AS current_stock FROM t_wms_location WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND source NOT IN ('AUNDE', 'TQ1') GROUP BY itemcode ) l ON l.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(NVL(b.cu_sangho, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{vendorName}) || '%'
AND UPPER(NVL(a.itemcode, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{pno}) || '%'
AND UPPER(NVL(c.itemname, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{pname}) || '%'
ORDER BY a.custcode, a.itemcode
SELECT 0 FROM DUAL

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY d.subname_ch, a.itemcode ) AS ROW_NUM, NVL(d.subname_ch, '') AS CAR_NAME, a.itemcode AS PNO, NVL(c.itemname, '') AS PNAME, SUM(a.qty) AS OUT_QTY, COUNT(a.itemcode) AS OUT_CNT, ROUND(AVG(a.qty), 2) AS AVG_OUT_QTY, '' AS REMARK FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN c_cust b ON b.cu_code = a.custcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_item c ON c.itemcode = a.itemcode INNER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON c.carno = d.subcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.outdate >= #{sdate} AND a.outdate < #{edate}
AND UPPER(NVL(d.subname_ch, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{carName}) || '%'
AND UPPER(NVL(a.itemcode, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{pno}) || '%'
AND UPPER(NVL(c.itemname, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{pname}) || '%'
GROUP BY d.subname_ch, a.itemcode, c.itemname ORDER BY d.subname_ch, a.itemcode
SELECT KIND, NAME, SUM(QTY) AS QTY, SUM(CNT) AS CNT FROM V_INTF WHERE SDATE BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate} GROUP BY KIND, NAME ORDER BY NAME, KIND

WITH BASE AS ( SELECT a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.kind, NVL(a.plusqty, 0) AS plusqty, NVL(a.minusqty, 0) AS minusqty, a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage FROM v_stock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1 AND ( (a.sdate = #{prevInventoryDate} AND a.kind = 'INVENTORY') OR (a.sdate >= #{monthStart} AND a.sdate <= #{week2End} AND a.kind <> 'INVENTORY') )
AND a.factory = #{factory}
AND a.storage = #{storage}
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL', 'SIDE SEAT', 'OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partNumber}) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.itemname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partName}) || '%'
), PREV AS ( SELECT itemcode, itemname, SUM(plusqty - minusqty) AS prev_stock FROM BASE WHERE sdate = #{prevInventoryDate} AND kind = 'INVENTORY' GROUP BY itemcode, itemname ), TXN AS ( SELECT itemcode, itemname,
/* 월초 ~ 선택주 전일까지 */ SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{monthStart} AND sdate <= #{prevDay} AND kind IN ('INCOMING', 'INCOMING EXCEPTION') THEN plusqty - minusqty ELSE 0 END ) AS cur_in,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{monthStart} AND sdate <= #{prevDay} AND kind IN ('WIP INPUT', 'LOAD', 'LOAD EXCEPTION') THEN ABS(plusqty - minusqty) ELSE 0 END ) AS cur_out,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{monthStart} AND sdate <= #{prevDay} AND kind IN ( 'INCOMING RETURN', 'WIP RETURN', 'LOAD RETURN', 'RECEIVING', 'SENDING', 'STOCKMOVE', 'PRODUCTION', 'PRODUCTIONMOVE', 'ADJUSTMENT' ) THEN plusqty - minusqty ELSE 0 END ) AS cur_etc,
/* 선택주 */ SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week1Start} AND sdate <= #{week1End} AND kind IN ('INCOMING', 'INCOMING EXCEPTION') THEN plusqty - minusqty ELSE 0 END ) AS n1_in,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week1Start} AND sdate <= #{week1End} AND kind IN ('WIP INPUT', 'LOAD', 'LOAD EXCEPTION') THEN ABS(plusqty - minusqty) ELSE 0 END ) AS n1_out,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week1Start} AND sdate <= #{week1End} AND kind IN ( 'INCOMING RETURN', 'WIP RETURN', 'LOAD RETURN', 'RECEIVING', 'SENDING', 'STOCKMOVE', 'PRODUCTION', 'PRODUCTIONMOVE', 'ADJUSTMENT' ) THEN plusqty - minusqty ELSE 0 END ) AS n1_etc,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week1Start} AND sdate <= #{week1End} AND kind IN ('WIP INPUT', 'LOAD', 'LOAD EXCEPTION') THEN ABS(plusqty - minusqty) ELSE 0 END ) AS n1_req,
/* 다음주 */ SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week2Start} AND sdate <= #{week2End} AND kind IN ('INCOMING', 'INCOMING EXCEPTION') THEN plusqty - minusqty ELSE 0 END ) AS n2_in,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week2Start} AND sdate <= #{week2End} AND kind IN ('WIP INPUT', 'LOAD', 'LOAD EXCEPTION') THEN ABS(plusqty - minusqty) ELSE 0 END ) AS n2_out,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week2Start} AND sdate <= #{week2End} AND kind IN ( 'INCOMING RETURN', 'WIP RETURN', 'LOAD RETURN', 'RECEIVING', 'SENDING', 'STOCKMOVE', 'PRODUCTION', 'PRODUCTIONMOVE', 'ADJUSTMENT' ) THEN plusqty - minusqty ELSE 0 END ) AS n2_etc,
SUM( CASE WHEN sdate >= #{week2Start} AND sdate <= #{week2End} AND kind IN ('WIP INPUT', 'LOAD', 'LOAD EXCEPTION') THEN ABS(plusqty - minusqty) ELSE 0 END ) AS n2_req
FROM BASE WHERE kind <> 'INVENTORY' GROUP BY itemcode, itemname ) SELECT NVL(p.itemcode, t.itemcode) AS ITEMCODE, NVL(p.itemname, t.itemname) AS ITEMNAME,
TRUNC(NVL(p.prev_stock, 0)) AS PREV_STOCK,
TRUNC(NVL(t.cur_in, 0)) AS CUR_IN, TRUNC(NVL(t.cur_out, 0)) AS CUR_OUT, TRUNC(ABS(NVL(t.cur_etc, 0))) AS CUR_ETC, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(t.cur_in, 0) + NVL(t.cur_out, 0) + NVL(t.cur_etc, 0) ) AS CUR_STOCK,
TRUNC(NVL(t.n1_in, 0)) AS N1_IN, TRUNC(NVL(t.n1_out, 0)) AS N1_OUT, TRUNC(ABS(NVL(t.n1_etc, 0))) AS N1_ETC, TRUNC(NVL(t.n1_out, 0) + NVL(t.n1_etc, 0)) AS N1_REQ, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(t.cur_in, 0) + NVL(t.cur_out, 0) + NVL(t.cur_etc, 0) + NVL(t.n1_in, 0) + NVL(t.n1_out, 0) + NVL(t.n1_etc, 0) ) AS N1_STOCK,
TRUNC(NVL(t.n2_in, 0)) AS N2_IN, TRUNC(NVL(t.n2_out, 0)) AS N2_OUT, TRUNC(ABS(NVL(t.n2_etc, 0))) AS N2_ETC, TRUNC(NVL(t.n2_out, 0) + NVL(t.n2_etc, 0)) AS N2_REQ, TRUNC( NVL(p.prev_stock, 0) + NVL(t.cur_in, 0) + NVL(t.cur_out, 0) + NVL(t.cur_etc, 0) + NVL(t.n1_in, 0) + NVL(t.n1_out, 0) + NVL(t.n1_etc, 0) + NVL(t.n2_in, 0) + NVL(t.n2_out, 0) + NVL(t.n2_etc, 0) ) AS N2_STOCK FROM PREV p FULL OUTER JOIN TXN t ON p.itemcode = t.itemcode ORDER BY NVL(p.itemcode, t.itemcode)d

SELECT DISTINCT a.factory FROM v_stock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1 AND ( (a.sdate = #{prevInventoryDate} AND a.kind = 'INVENTORY') OR (a.sdate >= #{monthStart} AND a.sdate <= #{week2End} AND a.kind <> 'INVENTORY') )
AND a.storage = #{storage}
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL', 'SIDE SEAT', 'OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partNumber}) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.itemname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partName}) || '%'
ORDER BY a.factory

SELECT DISTINCT a.storage FROM v_stock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1 AND ( (a.sdate = #{prevInventoryDate} AND a.kind = 'INVENTORY') OR (a.sdate >= #{monthStart} AND a.sdate <= #{week2End} AND a.kind <> 'INVENTORY') )
AND a.factory = #{factory}
AND UPPER(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partNumber}) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.itemname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{partName}) || '%'
ORDER BY a.storage

SELECT factory AS FACTORY, NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') AS RESPONSIBILITY, NVL(maincategory, 'Pending') AS MAINCATEGORY, SUM() AS QTY, SUM() AS OKQTY, SUM() AS NGQTY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection
GROUP BY factory, responsibility, maincategory ORDER BY factory DESC, responsibility, QTY DESC

SELECT factory AS FACTORY, NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') AS RESPONSIBILITY, NVL(subcategory, 'Pending') AS SUBCATEGORY, SUM() AS QTY, SUM() AS OKQTY, SUM() AS NGQTY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection
AND NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') = #{responsibility} AND NVL(maincategory, 'Pending') = #{maincategory} GROUP BY factory, responsibility, subcategory ORDER BY factory DESC, responsibility, QTY DESC

SELECT factory AS FACTORY, NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') AS RESPONSIBILITY, NVL(detailcategory, 'Pending') AS DETAILCATEGORY, SUM() AS QTY, SUM() AS OKQTY, SUM() AS NGQTY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection
AND NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') = #{responsibility} AND NVL(maincategory, 'Pending') = #{maincategory} AND NVL(subcategory, 'Pending') = #{subcategory} GROUP BY factory, responsibility, detailcategory ORDER BY factory DESC, responsibility, QTY DESC

SELECT sdate AS SDATE, itemcode AS ITEMCODE, itemname AS ITEMNAME, maincategory AS MAINCATEGORY, subcategory AS SUBCATEGORY, detailcategory AS DETAILCATEGORY, AS QTY, AS OKQTY, AS NGQTY, judgment AS JUDGMENT, source AS SOURCE, source2 AS SOURCE2, loginid AS LOGINID, barcode AS BARCODE, NVL(barcode2, barcode) AS BARCODE2 FROM t_wms_inspection
AND NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') = #{responsibility} AND NVL(maincategory, 'Pending') = #{maincategory} AND NVL(subcategory, 'Pending') = #{subcategory} AND NVL(detailcategory, 'Pending') = #{detailcategory} ORDER BY sdate DESC, itemcode, barcode

SELECT NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'INCOMING' THEN ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS INQTY, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'INCOMING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS INCOUNT,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'PROCESS' THEN ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS PROCESSQTY, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'PROCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS PROCESSCOUNT,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'RETURN' THEN ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS RETURNQTY, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'RETURN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS RETURNCOUNT,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'STORAGE' THEN ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS STORAGEQTY, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(NVL(source, '')) = 'STORAGE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS STORAGECOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection

SELECT NVL(source2, 'Pending') AS LABEL, SUM() AS QTY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection
GROUP BY source2 ORDER BY QTY DESC, LABEL

SELECT NVL(responsibility, 'Pending') AS LABEL, SUM() AS QTY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection
GROUP BY responsibility ORDER BY QTY DESC, LABEL

SELECT NVL(detailcategory, 'Pending') AS LABEL, SUM() AS QTY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM t_wms_inspection
GROUP BY detailcategory ORDER BY QTY DESC, LABEL

SELECT TO_CHAR(DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DT, SUM(QTY) OVER (ORDER BY DT) AS STOCK_QTY FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(TO_DATE(SDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS DT, SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS QTY FROM V_STOCK WHERE SDATE BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate}
AND UPPER(REPLACE(FACTORY, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{factory}, ' ', ''))
AND UPPER(REPLACE(STORAGE, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{storage}, ' ', ''))
GROUP BY TRUNC(TO_DATE(SDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ) ORDER BY DT

SELECT SDATE, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND WHERE SDATE BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate} AND SOURCE = 'INCOMING' AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(FACTORY, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{factory}, ' ', ''))
AND UPPER(REPLACE(STORAGE, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{storage}, ' ', ''))
GROUP BY SDATE ORDER BY SDATE

SELECT SDATE, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE WHERE SDATE BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate} AND SOURCE = 'RECEIVING' AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(FACTORY, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{factory}, ' ', ''))
AND UPPER(REPLACE(TO_STORAGE, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{storage}, ' ', ''))
GROUP BY SDATE ORDER BY SDATE

SELECT SDATE, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND WHERE SDATE BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate} AND SOURCE = 'LOAD' AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(FACTORY, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{factory}, ' ', ''))
AND UPPER(REPLACE(STORAGE, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{storage}, ' ', ''))
GROUP BY SDATE ORDER BY SDATE
